reasoning: Emotional (60%): The sprite reads as charming and toy-like — round white face, cute proportions, wooden crate base, and active blue sparkles convey a friendly summon feel rather than anything grim. However, the dominant palette is cool (teals, cyans, muted blues) with very little of the warm saturated greens/yellows/pinks the Hyrule spec requires. The skull-like face is cute not scary. Emotional score ~7/10. Technical (40%): Clean 1px hard outlines visible at all zoom levels, 2-3 tone hard shading on the crate body, no anti-aliasing artifacts, pixel-grid-snapped. Comparable in craft to Denzi peer reference. Technical score ~8/10. Weighted: (7×0.6)+(8×0.4)=7.4 → 7. Verdict marginal: passes technical axis, falls short on the warm/saturated Hyrule emotional palette requirement.
